description_long: This sculpture depicts a close-knit group of five human figures, likely representing a family, standing together in a tight embrace. The figures are rendered in a rough, expressive style with visible brushstrokes and textured surfaces, giving the piece a hand-crafted, almost clay-like appearance. The group consists of two adults and three children, all facing inward and holding each other, conveying a strong sense of unity and protection. The faces are detailed enough to show individual expressions, with the adults looking outward and the children nestled between them. The sculpture stands on a flat, rectangular base that appears to be textured to resemble a mat or ground surface. The coloration is predominantly earthy tones, with shades of brown, beige, and hints of gray, enhancing the organic and emotional quality of the piece.
description: A textured, earthy-toned sculpture of five human figures embracing closely, evoking themes of family and unity. The rough, hand-crafted style and expressive faces add emotional depth.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five figures' faces and the full embrace, highlighting the emotional connection and detailed expressions.
description_view_1: Side view focusing on the adult male figure and two children, with the embrace and overlapping arms clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the adult figures and the children, emphasizing the protective posture and textured surface.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view revealing the layered arrangement of the figures and the sculptural depth of the group hug.
attribute_subject_matter: group of human figures in an embrace
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is shown on a neutral, flat base with no visible environmental context, suggesting it could be installed in a public urban space or park.
